## Checklist

- [ ] `mvn verify` passes locally
- [ ] New or updated tests cover the change
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or `.env` files included
- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
